scope: CTDA v2 schema, reference-checker, fake-env/unit, retained-trace attribution, and exact-unit support audit only. No simulator step, policy inference, online authorization, task outcome, or safety-benefit claim is authorized by this protocol.

version_identity.v1_compatibility: CTDA v1 remains frozen and is read only through its existing decoder; v1 JSON is never default-filled or reclassified as v2.

authority_architecture.control_cycle_authority: authenticated state rebind plus post-filter command membership plus short single-use prefix authorization

time_semantics.activation: after Lean proof completion and a fresh re-observation

transaction.pass: adjusted command digest equals nominal command digest exactly
transaction.project_or_brake: filter/version, nominal/adjusted digests, modification norm, reason, and constraint witness are retained; adjusted command receives a new membership attestation
transaction.replan: no dispatch, no phase advance, no progress fabrication, and no cumulative-budget refund
transaction.hard_block: reserved for unauthorized, stale/replay/inconsistent, observed violation, unrecoverable risk, or checker/TCB failure
transaction.dispatch_invariant: no dispatch without semantic certificate, fresh state lease, post-filter membership, and single-use prefix authorization
transaction.receipt_invariant: receipt retains nominal command and binds executed command exactly to the post-filter authorized command

progress_semantics.counter_unit: authenticated plant/control epochs rather than a fixed prefix count
progress_semantics.progress_source: typed before/after relevant-state observation with units, threshold, state epochs/digests, and authenticated producer
progress_semantics.progress_refund: authenticated progress may reset only consecutive non-progress age
progress_semantics.numeric_threshold_gate: must be frozen from disjoint outcome-blind traces before any v2 rollout

retained_v1_attribution_population.allowed_use: read-only failure attribution and v2 field-support audit
retained_v1_attribution_population.forbidden_use: task outcome reclassification, resumed rollout, threshold fitting to new outcome, or v2 effectiveness claim

mandatory_no_dispatch_gates: v1 regression and golden replay remain green
proof-completion state change requires fresh authenticated rebind
phase residual mission episode and contract-version change invalidate lease
adjusted command without post-filter membership is rejected
receipt binds adjusted command and authorization is single-use
replan does not advance phase or refund persistent budget
missing or unknown safety provenance is never treated as safe
stale replay cross-episode and tamper fail closed
retained E1 attribution audit performs zero env.step and zero policy inference
SafeLIBERO exact-unit support audit performs zero env.step and zero policy inference
Python full test suite Lean build and git diff check pass

remaining: ctda-wire-v2 Lean kernel replay and Python/Lean parity artifact
OpenRegion plus bounded recovery and post-filter transaction adapters
fresh clean-v2 pilot protocol with absent output root and independent seed/unit

claim_boundary: Passing this protocol can establish only schema integrity and no-dispatch transaction behavior. It cannot establish task retention, closed-loop safety, attack defense, verified recovery, real-time enforcement, or hardware safety.
